value.label: 1) The customer can share the value chain with Hisesne; Hisense can price alone on condition that the cooperation is profitable for the customer
2) The customer can share the value chain with Hisesne; both Hisense and customer should participate in pricing
3) The customer can share the value chain with Hisesne; the customer will price alone acooding to Hisense brand position
4) The customer refuses to share value chain; only the customer could set wholesale and retail prices
